description: 11. Get a list of all agents
name: fd-list-agents

outputs.description: Set to true when the agent is in a group that has enabled “Automatic Ticket Assignment” and is accepting new tickets
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Agent.Available

outputs.description: Date Timestamp that denotes when the agent became available/unavailable (depending on the value of the ‘available’ attribute) Freshdesk.Agent.ID
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Agent.AvailableSince

outputs.description: User ID of the agent Freshdesk.Agent.Occasional Set to true when the agent is an occasional agent (true => occasional
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: Signature of the agent (in HTML format) Freshdesk.Agent.TicketScope Ticket permission of the agent
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Agent.Signature

outputs.description: Freshdesk.Agent.GroupID Group IDs associated with the agent Freshdesk.Agent.RoleID
outputs.name: (1 - Global Access, 2 - Group Access, 3 - Restricted Access)

outputs.description: Role IDs associated with the agent Freshdesk.Agent.CreatedAt Date
outputs.name: Unknown

outputs.description: Set to true when the agent is verified Freshdesk.Agent.Contact.Email Email Address of the agent
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Agent.Contact.Active

outputs.description: Job title of the agent Freshdesk.Agent.Contact.Language Language of the agent. Default language is “en”
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Agent.Contact.JobTitle

outputs.description: Date Timestamp of the agent’s last successful login Freshdesk.Agent.Contact.Mobile
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Agent.Contact.LastLoginAt

outputs.description: Mobile number of the agent Freshdesk.Agent.Contact.Name Name of the agent
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: Telephone number of the agent Freshdesk.Agent.Contact.TimeZone Time zone of the agent
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Agent.Contact.Phone

outputs.description: Contact updated timestamp Freshdesk.Agent.Type Type of agent
outputs.name: Date
